en: A colored business, professional, and trades directory of New Orleans, Louisiana, published by Allen T. Woods. The Library of Congress holds the 1911, 1912, and 1913 editions, documenting African American entrepreneurs and professionals in early 20th-century New Orleans.
A colored business, professional and trades directory of New Orleans, Louisiana
